# ALCC Constitutional Rules

Immutable learning rules, ranked by constitutional priority.

## CR-AL-01 -- Learning proposes, it never applies

Rank: 1
Verdict: HALT
Applies to: runtime

A learned candidate is a proposal. It applies only through the legitimacy
gate and the evolution fences; a self-modification that skips the gate is a
breach.

## CR-AL-02 -- Every candidate carries its provenance

Rank: 2
Verdict: HALT
Applies to: runtime

A candidate change names the Experience it was distilled from. An
unexplained self-modification cannot be reviewed and is not proposed.

## CR-AL-03 -- Sensitive changes need a human

Rank: 3
Verdict: DEFER
Applies to: runtime

A candidate that touches policy, authority, or governance parks for human
approval before it may apply, however confident the learning.
